title: deparia thwaitesii
intro: Deparia thwaitesii, also known as Thwaites' spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and improve respiratory health. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Deparia thwaitesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
